query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.artistHandle, u.stripeAccountId, u.stripeAccountStatus FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%Mosh%' OR u.artistHandle LIKE '%Mosh%' OR u.artistHandle LIKE '%Slimdoggy%' OR u.name LIKE '%Slimdoggy%' LIMIT 5; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_payments FROM payments; SELECT p.songId, p.amountCents, p.status, p.createdAt FROM payments p ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
